name: AI Bench
summary: A proposed public program for Drupal-specific model and agent benchmark tasks and community-submitted runs.

provenance.note: The project page describes proposed issue-resolution, tool/MCP-use, code-audit, translation, and community-run directions. They remain one program-level plan until concrete task artifacts are published.

artifacts.name: Drupal model and agent benchmark program plan
artifacts.question_answered: Which proposed Drupal benchmark directions should be monitored for concrete, locally adaptable task and evaluator artifacts?
artifacts.mapping_note: The project proposes issue resolution, tool and MCP use, code-audit score deltas, translation, and community-submitted runs. Promote each direction separately only when a concrete suite, case, dataset, grader, workflow, substrate, work item, or implementation merge request exists.
artifacts.claim_boundary: This project page records benchmark intentions, not an available task package, evaluator, retained result, or Agent Readiness coverage candidate.
